title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 discusses why humans remain better than current AI at reliably editing word documents, a task requiring precision and trust at scale. The core challenge is that AI struggles with the complex internal structure of document formats like .docx, which operate more like software programs than simple text files. The talk argues that reliable AI document editing requires treating documents as software rather than files.
